title: Observer-Gated Tau-Core Lensing: Feasibility, Identifiability, and Static-Control Protocol
description: Public reproducibility package for Paper 7, a claim-bounded observer-gated Tau-Core lensing feasibility and falsification-protocol study. The package contains manuscript source, rendered PDF, arXiv source package, derived artifacts, scripts, and tests. It is a theory-method feasibility package and does not claim a real-lensing detection, a completed Tau Core theory, or a derived parent action.
notes: The paper-level result is a falsifiable weak-field candidate/protocol with explicit blockers, not an empirical validation claim.
